# Pixelio

> סוכנות בוטי וואטסאפ AI לעסקים בישראל. בונה בוטים חכמים שעונים ללקוחות 24/7 בעברית טבעית.

## About
Pixelio builds AI-powered WhatsApp bots for small and medium businesses in Israel. Hebrew-native conversational AI that handles 90% of customer messages automatically — booking appointments, answering FAQs, qualifying leads — and escalates only what matters to the business owner.

## Product
- AI WhatsApp Bot — natural Hebrew conversation, 24/7 availability
- Connects to WhatsApp Business
- Custom knowledge base built per business
- Dashboard for editing bot content and reviewing conversations
- Optional integrations: calendar booking, payment links, Instagram + Facebook Messenger

## Pricing
- Launch Package — 2,500 ₪ one-time setup + 250–350 ₪/month maintenance (includes content updates, AI model updates, API costs)
- Multi-Channel add-on — +100 ₪/month (Instagram + Facebook Messenger)
- Calendar + Payments integration — +150 ₪/month
- No long-term commitment. Cancel any month.

## Process
1. 30-minute kickoff call to understand the business
2. We build the bot (5–7 days)
3. Joint testing and tone calibration
4. Goes live, connected to WhatsApp Business
5. Ongoing maintenance and improvement

## Live Demo
A working demo is available at https://pixelio.co.il/demo — a bot impersonating "Lior Gal Hair Salon" in Hod HaSharon. Visitors can chat with it directly to experience the product.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +972587122010
- Website: https://pixelio.co.il

## Target Audience
Small and medium businesses in Israel that receive high volumes of WhatsApp messages — hair salons, beauty clinics, restaurants, therapists, fitness studios, local service providers. Ideal for owner-operators losing time and leads to repetitive customer questions.
